bead.title: doc-graph: label-aware collision, degree-tuned forces, bounded convergence, settle/freeze semantics
bead.description: Replace forceCollide(48) circle-only collision with custom quadtree force that includes label bounding boxes (labels at x=24, up to 32 chars). Tune forceManyBody and forceLink for degree distribution. Add bounded-convergence (auto-freeze after settle). Drag-end semantics: release fx/fy (codex's recommendation, not re-pin).
bead.acceptance: 1. Custom label-aware collision force lands in D3Graph.svelte. 2. No two node circles overlap after settle on the 128-node fixture (Playwright bounding-box check). 3. Label bounding boxes do not overlap other nodes' circles after settle. 4. Settle completes within 2s (reported, not gated, per codex).
